meta_description: Suggest a video platform for FreeSaveVideo and vote for the platforms you want supported next.
title: what should we support next?
subtitle: Submit a video platform, see what other people requested, and vote for the platforms that matter to you.
already_supported: This platform is already supported. Try a specific public video URL on the download page.
already_requested: Someone already requested this platform. You can vote for it instead.
invalid_url: Enter a valid public website URL or domain.
submit_error: We could not submit this platform right now. Please try again.
created: Platform request created. Your first vote was added automatically.
vote_error: We could not update your vote. Please try again.
list_subtitle: Browse the platforms people want FreeSaveVideo to support.
empty: No platform requests match these filters yet.
not_found: This platform request could not be found.
load_error: We could not load platform requests. Please try again.
